name: MySQL SHOW DATABASES
description: 列出 MySQL 服务器中所有可访问的数据库

name: MySQL CREATE DATABASE
description: 创建新的 MySQL 数据库，可指定字符集和排序规则

examples.cmd: CREATE DATABASE mydb CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS mydb;

name: MySQL CREATE TABLE
description: 创建 MySQL 数据表，定义列名、类型、约束和索引

examples.cmd: CREATE TABLE users (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, email VARCHAR(200) UNIQUE, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE orders (id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id));

name: MySQL ALTER TABLE
description: 修改表结构：添加/删除/修改列、添加索引、重命名表等

examples.cmd: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN age INT;
ALTER TABLE users DROP COLUMN age;
ALTER TABLE users MODIFY COLUMN name VARCHAR(200);
ALTER TABLE users ADD INDEX idx_email (email);

name: MySQL INSERT
description: 向表中插入一行或多行数据
syntax: INSERT INTO <表名> (列1, 列2) VALUES (值1, 值2);

examples.cmd: INSERT INTO users (name, email) VALUES ("张三", "zhang@test.com");
INSERT INTO users (name, email) VALUES ("李四", "li@test.com"), ("王五", "wang@test.com");
INSERT INTO backup_users SELECT * FROM users WHERE active=1;

name: MySQL UPDATE/DELETE
description: 更新或删除表中的数据行
syntax: UPDATE <表> SET 列=值 WHERE 条件; / DELETE FROM <表> WHERE 条件;

examples.cmd: UPDATE users SET email="new@test.com" WHERE id=1;
UPDATE users SET status=0 WHERE last_login < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR);

name: MySQL SELECT 查询
description: 从表中查询数据，支持 WHERE、ORDER BY、LIMIT、GROUP BY、JOIN
syntax: SELECT [列] FROM <表> [WHERE 条件] [选项];

examples.cmd: SELECT name, email FROM users WHERE age > 18;
SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10 OFFSET 0;
SELECT status, COUNT(*) FROM orders GROUP BY status HAVING COUNT(*) > 5;

name: MySQL JOIN 联表查询
description: 多表关联查询：INNER JOIN, LEFT JOIN, RIGHT JOIN, CROSS JOIN
syntax: SELECT ... FROM <表1> [JOIN类型] <表2> ON <条件>;

examples.cmd: SELECT u.name, o.amount FROM users u INNER JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id;
SELECT u.name, o.amount FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id;
SELECT u.name, o.amount, p.name FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id=o.user_id JOIN products p ON o.product_id=p.id;

name: MySQL 索引管理
description: 创建、查看和删除索引，提高查询性能
syntax: CREATE INDEX <索引名> ON <表> (<列>); / DROP INDEX <索引名> ON <表>;

examples.cmd: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_email ON users(email);
CREATE INDEX idx_name_age ON users(name, age);

name: MySQL EXPLAIN
description: 分析 SQL 查询的执行计划，查看是否使用了索引

examples.cmd: EXPLAIN SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = "test@test.com";
EXPLAIN ANALYZE SELECT * FROM users WHERE name LIKE "%张%";
EXPLAIN FORMAT=JSON SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user_id=1;

name: mysql 客户端命令
description: MySQL 客户端内置命令：status、source、system、tee/pager、ego 等
syntax: 在 mysql> 提示符下输入

name: TRUNCATE TABLE
description: 快速清空表中的所有数据（不可回滚，比 DELETE 快）

name: REPLACE INTO
description: 插入新行或替换已存在的行（基于主键/唯一键判断）

examples.cmd: REPLACE INTO users (id, name, email) VALUES (1, "张三", "new@test.com");

name: RENAME TABLE
description: 重命名一个或多个表

examples.cmd: RENAME TABLE t1 TO new_t1, t2 TO new_t2;

name: mysqladmin
description: MySQL 服务器管理客户端，执行关停、状态查看、密码修改等管理操作

description: 检查、修复、优化和分析 MySQL 表

description: 从文本文件批量导入数据到 MySQL 表（LOAD DATA 的命令行版）

name: mysqlshow
description: 快速查看 MySQL 数据库、表、列等对象的命令行工具

name: MySQL 事务隔离级别
description: MySQL 事务隔离级别：READ UNCOMMITTED, READ COMMITTED, REPEATABLE READ, SERIALIZABLE

examples.cmd: SET SESSION TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ COMMITTED;
SET GLOBAL TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL REPEATABLE READ;

name: LOAD DATA INFILE
description: 高效地从文本文件导入大量数据到 MySQL 表
syntax: LOAD DATA [LOCAL] INFILE <文件> INTO TABLE <表> [选项];

examples.cmd: LOAD DATA INFILE "/tmp/data.csv" INTO TABLE users FIELDS TERMINATED BY "," LINES TERMINATED BY "\n" IGNORE 1 ROWS;
LOAD DATA LOCAL INFILE "data.csv" INTO TABLE users (name, email);

name: SELECT INTO OUTFILE
description: 将查询结果导出到文本文件

examples.cmd: SELECT * FROM users INTO OUTFILE "/tmp/users.csv" FIELDS TERMINATED BY "," LINES TERMINATED BY "\n";
SELECT name, email INTO OUTFILE "/tmp/contacts.csv" FROM users;

name: MySQL 存储过程与函数
description: 创建和管理 MySQL 存储过程和函数

examples.cmd: DELIMITER // CREATE PROCEDURE GetAllUsers() BEGIN SELECT * FROM users; END // DELIMITER ;

name: MySQL 触发器
description: 创建和管理 MySQL 触发器（BEFORE/AFTER INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE）
syntax: CREATE TRIGGER <名称> <时机> <事件> ON <表> FOR EACH ROW <语句>;

examples.cmd: CREATE TRIGGER before_insert_users BEFORE INSERT ON users FOR EACH ROW SET NEW.created_at = NOW();

name: MySQL 事件调度器
description: MySQL 事件调度器，在指定时间自动执行 SQL 语句
syntax: CREATE EVENT <名称> ON SCHEDULE <调度> DO <语句>;

examples.cmd: CREATE EVENT clean_logs ON SCHEDULE EVERY 1 DAY DO DELETE FROM logs WHERE created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY);

name: MySQL 存储引擎
description: MySQL 存储引擎管理：查看、设置、对比（InnoDB/MyISAM/MEMORY等）
syntax: SHOW ENGINES; / ALTER TABLE <表> ENGINE=<引擎>;

name: MySQL 二进制日志
description: MySQL 二进制日志（binlog）管理：查看、解析、清理
syntax: SHOW BINARY LOGS; / mysqlbinlog <日志文件>

examples.cmd: PURGE BINARY LOGS BEFORE NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY;

name: MySQL UNION
description: 合并多个 SELECT 语句的结果集（UNION去重，UNION ALL保留重复）

examples.cmd: SELECT name FROM customers UNION SELECT name FROM suppliers;
SELECT name FROM t1 UNION ALL SELECT name FROM t2;
(SELECT name FROM t1) UNION (SELECT name FROM t2) ORDER BY name;

name: MySQL 子查询
description: MySQL 子查询：IN, EXISTS, 标量子查询, 派生表, CTE（WITH）

examples.cmd: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user_id IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE status=1);
SELECT * FROM users u WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE o.user_id=u.id);
SELECT name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE orders.user_id=users.id) AS cnt FROM users;
WITH active AS (SELECT * FROM users WHERE status=1) SELECT * FROM active WHERE age>18;
